notes: No API key is stored here. Configure keys with environment variables only.
auto tries Bing when BING_SEARCH_API_KEY exists, then Google when GOOGLE_SEARCH_API_KEY and GOOGLE_SEARCH_CX exist, then DuckDuckGo HTML fallback.
All providers are for public web search only. Do not log in, store cookies, or bypass anti-scraping controls.

providers.name: bing
providers.notes: Uses the Bing Web Search compatible endpoint. Default endpoint is https://api.bing.microsoft.com/v7.0/search.

providers.name: google
providers.notes: Requires a Google Programmable Search Engine cx id.

providers.name: duckduckgo
providers.notes: No key required. Parsing can be less stable than API providers.
